title: Marc Schoenauer
text: Home * People * Marc Schoenauer Marc Schoenauer [1] Marc Schoenauer , a French mathematician and computer scientist, along with Michèle Sebag head of the TAO Project Team [2] and senior researcher of LRI with INRIA Saclay - IDF , CNRS , Paris-Sud 11 University . He graduated at École Normale Supérieure in Paris , and obtained a Ph.D. in numerical analysis at Université Paris 6 in 1980. Schoenauer has been working in the field of evolutionary computation (EC) and genetic programming since the early 90s, more particularly at the interface between EC and machine learning [3] .
